status: stopped on first invalid arm before Opus judging

failure.condition: compact C3 treatment under the minimal isolated system prompt
failure.reason: Claude CLI stopped before C3 uptake because the provider-reported cost exceeded the registered per-arm ceiling.

product_learning: The minimal system prompt did not reduce Claude Haiku startup cost enough to admit a treatment arm under the ceiling. A successor must use a cheaper arm runtime while preserving two independent Claude Opus medium-or-stronger judges.
post_failure_rule: Do not rerun the exposed case. Any successor must use a fresh replacement case and externally freeze the arm runtime, model, pricing basis, and Opus judging floor before inference.
